title: MMA Fight Card

setup: Store the Higgsfield API key in the server secret manager.
Set HIGGSFIELD_API_BASE_URL to the contracted raw API endpoint.
Submit each queue job as an image or video generation request.
Poll job status and download outputs into the listed outputTargets.

style.aesthetic: UFC-like premium MMA broadcast, intentionally non-branded
tokens: red corner and blue corner tension
style.rightsPolicy: Generated assets must not include official promotion logos, sponsor marks, broadcaster marks, venue marks, or real fighter likenesses unless licensed.

apis.purpose: Generate non-branded MMA UI art, social cards, icons, and short motion loops.
apis.auth: Server-side API key only; do not store API keys in the repo or expose them to clients.
notes: Use a configurable enterprise/private endpoint until Higgsfield publishes stable raw API docs.

apis.purpose: Fallback generation path when raw API access is not enabled for the account.
apis.auth: MCP account login or Higgsfield CLI auth login.

apis.purpose: Bout cards, fighters, event schedule, method results, fighter stats, and settlement evidence.
apis.auth: Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key header from a server-side secret manager.

apis.purpose: Optional moneyline and prop odds for odds display, market context, and responsible-play copy.
apis.auth: Server-side API key; never expose to clients.

apis.purpose: Store generated originals, crops, thumbnails, attribution, prompt metadata, and moderation state.
Attest host-entered fight results, disputed scorecards, trivia banks, and generated asset review states.

Generate the MMA Fight Card MMA asset pack with Higgsfield.
Use a premium non-branded MMA broadcast aesthetic: octagon-inspired cage geometry, red and blue corners, matte black arena, canvas white, gold accents.

Create every job below, preserve mobile-safe negative space, and return downloadable PNG or MP4 assets named by outputTargets.
